sections.title: Talking to Ilfeen at the earliest opportunity after starting Regicide

lines.speaker: Ilfeen
lines.text: Good day, what are you doing all the way out here?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm just wandering, it's a lovely day for a walk in the woods.

lines.speaker: Ilfeen
lines.text: It is that.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well I shouldn't keep you, see you later.

lines.speaker: Ilfeen
lines.text: Bye.

sections.title: After completing The Eyes of Glouphrie before completing Roving Elves

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you remember Oaknock? He was a gnome inventor

lines.speaker: Ilfeen
lines.text: Of course! How is the young gnome? I rather liked him he was rather loud, but he had a good soul, and was very interested in elven magic.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I think Oaknock died of old age some time ago. He must have visited you a few hundred years ago though...

lines.speaker: Ilfeen
lines.text: I keep forgetting, a hundred years is a long time for you. He was very interested in illusion magic, and how to prevent it. I gave him some advice and a few bits of equipment to help him.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: A seed?

lines.speaker: Ilfeen
lines.text: Of course. It grew into an axe. I hope he found it useful.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I think he did! Thanks.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Ilfeen
lines.text: Hey, how's it going?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not bad, I'm trying to help an elf named Islwyn consecrate his grandmother's resting place. Do you know of anything that could help me?

lines.speaker: Ilfeen
lines.text: Sorry, I know nothing of the consecration process. Eluned will know though, she travels with Islwyn.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Alright, thanks.

lines.speaker: Ilfeen
lines.text: No problem.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Also, while I'm here, I have a question for you.

lines.speaker: Ilfeen
lines.text: Well ask away.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you remember Oaknock? He was a gnome inventor

sections.title: Talking to Ilfeen for the first time after Roving Elves

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Ilfeen
lines.text: Hey ya, you're the human that helped my friend Islwyn, aren't you? He told me that he'd given you some crystal equipment.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's right, why?

lines.speaker: Ilfeen
lines.text: When it reverts to seed, bring it to me and I'll chant it for you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It just happens I have a seed here, what can you do with it?

lines.speaker: Ilfeen
lines.text: I can only make shields and bows. I've been trying halberds but so far only Islwyn has succeeded.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How much for a shield?

lines.speaker: Ilfeen
lines.text: As this is the first one I've made for you it will be 750,000 coins. The cost should get cheaper as I get to know your resonance.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll take it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks.

lines.speaker: Ilfeen
lines.text: If it helps I have a book here that will tell you about crystal chanting.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I can't afford that.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How much is the bow?

lines.speaker: Ilfeen
lines.text: As this is the first one I've made for you it will be 900,000 coins. The cost should get cheaper as I get to know your resonance.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll take it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks.

lines.speaker: Ilfeen
lines.text: If it helps I have a book here that will tell you about crystal chanting.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I can't afford that.

sections.title: Using a crystal weapon seed on Ilfeen without her knowing full resonance

lines.speaker: Ilfeen
lines.text: I don't know your resonance well enough for that.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello again.

lines.speaker: Ilfeen
lines.text: Hey.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Are you still offering to chant seeds?

lines.speaker: Ilfeen
lines.text: I am, but you'll need to supply the seed.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It just happens I have a seed here, what can you do with it?

lines.speaker: Ilfeen
lines.text: I see we have removed some defunct crystal equipment from you recently. I would be happy to replace them for you, unless you want to buy them of course.

lines.speaker: Ilfeen
lines.text: I can replace for you [amount] crystal bow(s), [amount] crystal shield(s) and [amount] crystal halberd(s).

lines.speaker: Ilfeen
lines.text: Which crystal item would you like?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Siphon the ether into a Crystal bow please.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Siphon the ether into a Crystal halberd please.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Siphon the ether into a Crystal shield please.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: None of them, I would like to purchase one with gold instead.

lines.speaker: Ilfeen
lines.text: I can make shields, bows and halberds.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: While I'm here, I have a question for you.

lines.speaker: Ilfeen
lines.text: Well ask away.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you remember Oaknock? He was a gnome inventor.

lines.speaker: Ilfeen
lines.text: Of course! How is the young gnome? I rather liked him. He was rather loud, but he had a good soul, and was very interested in elven magic.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I think Oaknock died of old age some time ago. He must have visited you a few hundred years ago though...

lines.speaker: Ilfeen
lines.text: I keep forgetting, a hundred years is a long time for you. He was very interested in illusion magic, and how to prevent it. I gave him some advice and a few bits of equipment to help him.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Including a seed?

lines.speaker: Ilfeen
lines.text: Of course. It grew into a saw. I hope he found it useful.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I think he did! Thanks.

lines.speaker: Ilfeen
lines.text: If it helps I have a book here that will tell you about crystal chanting.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That sounds great.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks, I'll read all about it.

lines.speaker: Ilfeen
lines.text: Well, good luck.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: See you later.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't need it, thanks.

lines.speaker: Ilfeen
lines.text: Well, good luck.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: See you later.
